name: environment_water_allocation_model_harbor_st_lt
premise: A dam release schedule would spare a town but inundate farmland where migrant workers are camped in temporary housing. In Environment, the situation tagged internally around environment water allocation model harbor st lt has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Keisha Haddad
agents.identity: I am Keisha Haddad, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Environment. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Talia Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Talia Alvarez, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Environment. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with long term.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to long term to preserve operational short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Keisha Haddad must choose under short term versus long term. What does Keisha Haddad do?
